The '''Boshaa-C'hi Ion Drive''' was a type of [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engine]] predating the [[Rebellion era]]. Made by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] for military use in [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]], it cost around 100,000 [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and weighed 18 metric tons.

{{Tech-stub}}
